SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.mode

Class GameResult

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.model.mode.GameResult
public class GameResult extends Object
Immutable game session result with score, statistics, and completion status. Supports all game modes with mode-specific metrics.
Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameResult(int finalScore, int highScore, boolean isNewHighScore, GameModeType gameMode, long playTime, int linesCleared, int levelReached, boolean completed)

    Description

    Gets the final score achieved in this game session.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameResult

      public GameResult(int finalScore, int highScore, boolean isNewHighScore, GameModeType gameMode, long playTime, int linesCleared, int levelReached, boolean completed)
      Constructs a game result.
      Parameters:
      finalScore - Final score achieved
      highScore - High score for this mode
      isNewHighScore - Whether new high score
      gameMode - Game mode played
      playTime - Play time in milliseconds
      linesCleared - Lines cleared count
      levelReached - Level reached (0 for endless)
      completed - Whether completed successfully

  • Method Details

    • getFinalScore

      public int getFinalScore()
      Gets the final score achieved in this game session.
      Returns:
      the final score value

    • getHighScore

      public int getHighScore()
      Gets the high score for this game mode.
      Returns:
      the high score value

    • isNewHighScore

      public boolean isNewHighScore()
      Checks if this game session achieved a new high score.
      Returns:
      true if this is a new high score, false otherwise

    • getGameMode

      public GameModeType getGameMode()
      Gets the game mode that was played.
      Returns:
      the game mode type

    • getPlayTime

      public long getPlayTime()
      Gets the total play time in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      play time in milliseconds

    • getLinesCleared

      public int getLinesCleared()
      Gets the total number of lines cleared in this game session.
      Returns:
      the lines cleared count

    • getLevelReached

      public int getLevelReached()
      Gets the level reached in this game session.
      Returns:
      the level number (0 for endless mode)

      Note: Reserved for future use - not currently invoked. Level information is available through other means in the current implementation.

    • isCompleted

      public boolean isCompleted()
      Checks if the game was completed successfully.
      Returns:
      true if completed, false if game over

    • getFormattedPlayTime

      public String getFormattedPlayTime()
      Gets formatted play time as MM:SS.
      Returns:
      formatted time string (e.g., "05:23")

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
